submission.title: Submission
submission.description: A labor designation entry registered by site engineers.

id.description: Unique identifier of the log entry.

date.description: The calendar date of the labor assignment.

laborsName.description: The name of the subcontracted external labor.

designation.description: The professional role or designation of the labor.

reassignedTask.description: The precise task assigned for monitoring.

attendanceStatus.description: The labor attendance status (Present, Absent, Under Time).

createdAt.description: The ISO timestamp when this entry was submitted.

labor_code.title: LaborCode
labor_code.description: A labor code to labor name mapping entry.

name.description: The labor name associated with the code.

createdAt.description: The timestamp when this mapping was created.

project_code.title: ProjectCode
project_code.description: A project code mapping entry containing name and site location.

name.description: The project name associated with the code.

location.description: The site location associated with the project.

createdAt.description: The timestamp when this mapping was created.

setting.title: Setting
setting.description: System settings and access control configuration.

passcode.description: The secure passcode string stored in Firestore.

isConfigured.description: Whether this configuration setting has been initialized.

/submissions/{id}.description: A collection of individual external subcontracted labor designation entries.

/labor_codes/{id}.description: A collection of labor codes and names.

/project_codes/{id}.description: A collection of project codes, names, and site locations.

/settings/{id}.description: A collection of application settings including security and credentials.
